stocks_intro_1: Ma share akhala chikayikidwe chodalirika kwa zaka zambiri ndipo amaimira zigawo zauchuma mu makampani.
stocks_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zinapangidwa mu 2009 zomwe zimagwira ntchito modziyimira popanda kampani kapena boma lililonse.
stocks_intro_3: Koma kodi kukhala ndi zigawo mu kampani kumasiyana bwanji ndi kukhala ndi ndalama zadigitala ngati Bitcoin? Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa Bitcoin ndi Ma Share.
stocks_point_7: Chitetezo chosiyanasiyana pa kukwera kwa mitengo
point_1_summary_1: Mukakhala ndi Bitcoin, muli ndi umwini wachindunji wa chumachi. Mukakhala ndi ma share, muli ndi gawo la kampani, kutanthauza kuti chikayikidwe chanu chidalira momwe kampaniyo ikuyendera, zisankho za olamulira, ndi kupambana kwa bizinesiyo.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi malire olimba a bitcoin 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko.
point_2_summary_2: Makampani amatha kutulutsa ma share atsopano nthawi iliyonse, kuchepetsa gawo la umwini wa eni ake omwe alipo. Izi zikutanthauza kuti gawo lanu la kampaniyo limachepa ma share atsopano akapangidwa.
point_2_summary_3: Izi ndi zochepa kuposa kukwera kwa ndalama za boma, koma kukwera kumene.
point_2_summary_4: Ndi Bitcoin, gawo lanu la keiki silichepa.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito pa netiweki yogawidwa yopanda malo ovutikira amodzi. Ma share akuyikidwa ku chiwopsezo cha anthu ofunika - ngati mkulu wa kampani atachoka, kudwala, kapena kupanga zisankho zoyipa, chikayikidwe chanu chikhoza kuvutika kwambiri.
point_4_summary_1: Mtengo wa Bitcoin umasankhidwa ndi kufunika ndi kuchuluka pa msika. Mitengo ya ma share nthawi zambiri imawunikiridwa pogwiritsa ntchito ma P/E ratio (Mtengo-ku-Phindu), omwe amaonetsa ndalama zomwe ogula amalipira pa dola iliyonse ya phindu la kampani.
point_5_summary_1: Bitcoin imagulitsidwa maola 24 patsiku, masiku 7 pasabata pa masika apadziko lonse.
point_5_summary_4: Masika a ma share amatsegulidwa maola a ntchito okha pa masiku antchito, zomwe zimaletsa nthawi yomwe mungagule kapena kugulitsa.
point_6_summary_1: Ndi Bitcoin, mutha kusunga ndalama zanu nokha, kutanthauza kuti ndinu eni enieni popanda kudalira wina aliyense.
point_6_summary_2: Kusunga wekha n'kosavuta ngati kutitsa pulogalamu.
point_6_summary_3: Ma share amafuna akaunti ya brokereji ndipo muli pa chiwopsezo - ngati kampani itafa kapena brokereji italephera, mungatasiye chikayikidwe chanu.
point_6_summary_4: Simukhala ndi umwini weniweni wa ma sertifiketi a ma share mwachindunji.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin ndi chuma chokhazikika chokhala ndi malire olimba a Bitcoin 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko. Izi zimapangitsa chitetezo chabwino pa kukwera kwa mitengo. Ma share ali ndi momwe amagwirira ntchito mosiyanasiyana pa kukwera kwa mitengo - makampani ena amayenda bwino pomwe ena amalephera.
